1000628594.english: The Commander is the one... Ugh...

1000628595.english: I picked up Lace, whose legs had given out and was collapsing, and looked at Tomo.
1000628595.korean: - 다리가 풀려 쓰러지는 레이스를 안아들고 토모를 보았다.

1000628597.english: Kirishima is still standing there calmly, but there is already enough evidence.
1000628597.korean: - 키리시마는 여전히 여유롭게 서있지만, 이미 증거는 충분하다.

1000628598.english: - If I step back for now, regroup, and ensure they face the judgment of the law...!
1000628598.korean: - 일단 물러가서 재정비를 하고 확실히 법의 심판을 받게 하면...!

1000628599.english: How are you all doing? It is a pleasant evening!

1000628600.english: Don't move an inch from where you are! I am arresting all of you immediately!
1000628600.korean: 그 자리에서 꼼짝도 하지 마시게나! 자네들을 전부 긴급 체포하겠네!

1000628601.english: Representative Kirishima has been embroiled in controversy due to illegal acts involving bioroids.
1000628601.korean: 바이오로이드를 이용한 위법행위로 인해 키리시마 중의원은 논란에 휩싸였습니다.

1000628602.english: The whole world was shocked by a shocking scandal. In response, Representative Kirishima denied all charges...
1000628602.korean: 충격적인 스캔들에 전 세계가 충격에 빠졌습니다. 이에 키리시마 중의원은 일체의 혐의에 대해 부인을...

1000628603.english: The righteous reporter Kimura and his assistant 'Joyful Tomo' are...
1000628603.korean: 정의로운 기자 키무라와 그의 조수 '즐거운 토모'는...

1000628604.english: - Content regarding this incident is being broadcast on all channels.
1000628604.korean: - 모든 채널에서는 이번 사건에 대한 내용이 흘러나오고 있다.

1000628605.english: While walking down the street listening to the news, someone put their arm around my shoulder.
1000628605.korean: - 뉴스에 귀를 기울이며 거리를 걷던 도중, 누군가 어깨동무를 해왔다.

1000628606.english: Hahaha, it's no wonder we stole the spotlight. We did something amazing.
1000628606.korean: 하하핫, 눈길을 빼앗길만하지. 우린 대단한 일을 했다고.

1000628607.english: Here, take a look at this newspaper, too.
1000628607.korean: 여기, 이 신문도 한 번 봐.

1000628608.english: We were all arrested by the police and interrogated, including Kasasagi and Kirishima.
1000628608.korean: - 카사사기와 키리시마를 포함해 우리는 모두 경찰에 체포되어 조사를 받았다.

1000628609.english: Just as he had boasted, Kirishima was released not long after by order of a high-ranking official who had come to visit him in a groveling manner.
1000628609.korean: - 호언장담했던대로 키리시마는 얼마 지나지않아 굽실거리며 찾아온 고위 공직자의 명령으로 석방되었다.

1000628610.english: However, the moment Kirishima was about to leave the police station... the information we found, which must have clearly been destroyed, began to be reported simultaneously on the news.
1000628610.korean: - 그러나 키리시마가 경찰서 밖으로 나가려던 순간... 분명 파기되었을, 우리가 찾은 정보가 뉴스에서 일제히 보도되기 시작했다.

1000628611.english: On the front page of the newspaper Sherlock handed over, there was a huge photo of a smiling Tomo and a very awkward-looking Sherlock.
1000628611.korean: - 셜록이 내민 신문 1면엔 환하게 웃는 토모와 몹시 어색해보이는 셜록의 사진이 대문짝만하게 실려 있었다.

1000628612.english: Well, what can you do? It's my first time experiencing something like this.
1000628612.korean: 그야 어쩔 수 없잖나. 이런 건 처음인걸.

1000628613.english: Ahahaha! Sherlock's face is really weird!

1000628614.english: Shut up. Did you contribute anything?

1000628615.english: By the way, how is it that not a single place has posted a photo taken with you?
1000628615.korean: 그나저나 어떻게 한 곳도 자네와 함께 찍은 사진을 올린 곳이 없는 거지?

1000628616.english: I'm sorry. I've already called everyone to complain, so your photo will be included starting with tomorrow's article.
1000628616.korean: 미안하다. 일단 전부 전화를 돌려서 항의해놨으니 내일자 기사부터는 자네 사진도 실릴거야.

1000628617.english: I had a hunch, but I decided to just let it slide for now.
1000628617.korean: - 짚이는 점은 있었지만, 일단 적당히 흘려넘기기로 했다.

1000628618.english: Let's talk later! Now, hurry up and get the sushi! Huh? Huh?
1000628618.korean: 얘기는 나중에 해! 지금은 빨리 초밥! 응? 응?

1000628619.english: Right. Being late for an appointment isn't polite.
1000628619.korean: 그래. 예약 시간에 늦는 건 예의가 아니지.

1000628621.english: The case is solved. But the fact that there is no reward probably means the game isn't completely over yet.
1000628621.korean: - 사건은 해결했다. 그런데 보상이 없다는 건 아직 게임이 완전히 끝나지 않았다는 거겠지.

1000628622.english: - And as for what needs to be done now... I can roughly guess.
1000628622.korean: - 그리고 지금 해야할 행동은... 대충 예상이 간다.

1000628623.english: Haa... He really has a lot of secrets.

1000628625.english: Still, don't just disappear without a word like last time. That hurts quite a bit.
1000628625.korean: 그래도 저번처럼 말도 없이 사라져버리진 말라고. 그거, 꽤 상처받으니까.

1000628627.english: Sherlock nudged me, who was unable to answer, as if to say "don't worry about it," and turned away without a second thought.
1000628627.korean: - 아무대답도 하지 못하는 나를, 셜록은 신경쓰지 말라는 듯 툭 치고는 미련없이 몸을 돌렸다.

1000628630.english: Tomo hugged me tightly before I could even react.
1000628630.korean: - 내가 반응하기도 전에 토모가 폭 안겨왔다.

1000628631.english: Tomo, who had pulled away only after tightly hugging my waist once as if to imprint the touch, looked up at me and smiled sweetly.
1000628631.korean: - 마치 감촉을 새기려는 듯, 한 차례 허리를 꼬옥 끌어안고 나서야 떨어진 토모가 나를 올려다보며 배시시 웃었다.

1000628632.english: I made one more friend... so I was really happy.
1000628632.korean: 친구가 한 명 더 생겨서... 정말로 즐거웠어.

1000628633.english: Hmm, well? Hehe, I don't really know about Tomo. Because he's an idiot.
1000628633.korean: 으응, 글쎄? 헤헷, 토모는 잘 모르겠어. 바보니까.

1000628634.english: Whoa, Tomo! The sushi is already out!

1000628635.english: Uh, I didn't order this... S-Is this complimentary? Thank you!
1000628635.korean: 엇, 이건 안시켰는데... 서, 서비스입니까? 감사합니다!

1000628636.english: Wahahaha, if you don't hurry up, I'll eat it all!
1000628636.korean: 와하하하핫, 빨리 안오면 내가 다 먹는다!

1000628637.english: Eh, you can't eat it all!

1000628639.english: Tomo ran straight to Sherlock, who was calling him, as if he no longer needed to explain.
1000628639.korean: - 토모는 그대로 자신을 부르는 셜록에게 달려갔다. 마치 더이상 자신이 설명할 필요는 없다는 것처럼.

1000628640.english: Or... as if we were about to meet again any moment.

1000628642.english: I arrived at the school where I had caused a disturbance and headed to the student council building.
1000628642.korean: - 한차례 소란을 벌였었던 학교에 도착해 학생회 건물로 향했다.

1000628643.english: Among the characters revealed so far, there is only one person who would leak information to help Tomo.
1000628643.korean: - 지금까지 밝혀진 인물 중에, 토모를 돕기 위해 정보를 흘릴 만한 사람은 딱 한사람 밖에 없다.

1000628644.english: However, when I opened the door, the person who greeted me was someone completely unexpected.
1000628644.korean: - 하지만 문을 열자 날 반겨준 것은 전혀 예상 외의 인물이었다.

1000628645.english: Wrong~ That is only half correct.

1000628646.english: You went through all this trouble trying to find me, and you don't even recognize me? I'm a little disappointed.
1000628646.korean: 날 찾으려고 이렇게 고생을 해놓고 알아보지도 못 하는 거야? 조금 서운한데~

1000628647.english: Maybe it's because I was too immersed in the game. I had forgotten why I started this game in the first place.
1000628647.korean: - 게임에 너무 몰입해서일까. 애초에 내가 이 게임을 시작한 이유에 대해서 잊고 있었다.

1000628648.english: Correct! It's the super genius beautiful girl detective, Leanne~

1000628650.english: While I was wondering how to answer, I held my breath at Leanne's next words.
1000628650.korean: - 어떻게 대답해야할 지 고민하던 중, 이어지는 리앤의 말에 나는 숨을 삼켰다.

1000628652.english: Leanne said that it is a model derived from 'Happy Tomo'. So, it is fully understandable that they resemble each other.
1000628652.korean: - 리앤은 '즐거운 토모'로 부터 파생된 모델이라고 했다. 그래서 닮은 것은 충분히 이해할 수 있다.

1000628653.english: However, that smile, every light gesture, and the atmosphere they exude are so similar.
1000628653.korean: - 하지만 저 웃는 모습이라던가, 가벼운 손짓 하나하나, 풍기는 분위기가 너무 닮아있다.

1000628656.english: Well, the interpretation would vary depending on how the definition of the same person is defined, but...
1000628656.korean: 음, 동일인물의 정의가 어떻게 되느냐에 따라 해석이 달라지겠지만...

1000628657.english: By my standards, the happy Tomo is also 'me'.

1000628658.english: And Watson, who originally did not exist, and 'that' joyful Tomo, who experienced these few days that originally did not exist, and 'me'.
1000628658.korean: 그리고 원래는 존재하지 않는 왓슨과 원래는 없었던 이 며칠간을 겪은 '그' 즐거운 토모도 '나'.

1000628659.english: Ah, there was room for misunderstanding. I'm not saying the incident itself never happened.
1000628659.korean: 아, 오해의 소지가 있었네. 이 사건 자체가 없었다는 건 아냐.

1000628660.english: The plot only changed because of Watson's presence. Watson stirred things up a lot and used a lot of fouls, didn't he?
1000628660.korean: 왓슨의 존재 때문에 전개가 바뀐 것 뿐이지. 왓슨, 엄청 헤집고 다닌데다가 반칙도 많이 썼잖아?

1000628661.english: Whoever made this game, they surely wouldn't have intended for it to receive this much external support.
1000628661.korean: - 이 게임을 누가 만들었든간에, 이렇게나 외부의 지원을 많이 받는 것을 의도했을리는 없겠지.

1000628662.english: Ahahaha. It's okay, it's okay. Actually, I helped out a few times because I made mistakes too.
1000628662.korean: 아하하핫. 괜찮아, 괜찮아. 사실 나도 실수한 게 있어서 몇 번 도와준거니까.

1000628663.english: I recalled that Tomo had said something incomprehensible like "I'm sorry" after doing the deduction on my behalf.
1000628663.korean: - 토모가 나를 대신해서 추리를 한 뒤 미안하다는 알 수 없는 말을 했던 것을 떠올렸다.

1000628664.english: Hmm... It's a basic rule of basics that in mystery stories, you shouldn't use elements that haven't appeared earlier when solving a case...
1000628664.korean: 으응... 추리물에서 사건이 해결될 때 앞에서 등장하지 않았던 요소를 쓰면 안된다는 건 기본중에 기본인데...

1000628665.english: This is the first time I've made a game like this, so I missed a few things. Hehe, sorry.
1000628665.korean: 내가 이런 게임은 처음 만들어봐서 놓친 게 몇 개 있어. 헤헷, 미안해.

1000628667.english: ...I wanted someone to know the story of 'me' and my friend.
1000628667.korean: ...'나'와 내 친구의 이야기를... 누군가 알아줬음 했거든.

1000628668.english: Information regarding the Kirishima scandal was so scarce that it didn't even remain in the Orca database. It was probably... thoroughly erased by someone.
1000628668.korean: - 키리시마 스캔들에 대한 정보는 오르카 데이터 베이스에도 남아있지 않을 정도였다. 아마... 누군가의 손에 의해 철저히 지워졌겠지.

1000628669.english: Continuing from what we were talking about earlier, um... Watson probably knows that our Leanne models have disappeared. Right?
1000628669.korean: 좀 전의 얘기랑 이어지는데, 음... 아마 왓슨은 우리 리앤 모델들이 자취를 감췄다는 것까지는 알고있을거야. 그렇지?

1000628670.english: Yes. We were created with 'Happy Tomo's' genes. And in that process, Happy Tomo's memories were passed down to us.
1000628670.korean: 응. 우리는 '즐거운 토모'의 유전자로 만들어졌어. 그리고 그 과정에서 즐거운 토모의 기억이 우리에게 전해졌지.

1000628671.english: This is why it varies depending on the definition of the same person.
1000628671.korean: 동일인물의 정의에 따라 달라진다는 건 이거 때문이야.

1000628672.english: Because the answer to the question, "If a being that looks slightly similar and has very similar genes possesses the memories of another being, is it the same person?" would vary from person to person.
1000628672.korean: "생긴 게 조금 비슷하고, 유전자가 몹시 비슷할 뿐인 존재가 다른 존재의 기억을 갖고 있다면 그건 동일인물일까?" 에 대한 대답은 사람마다 다를 테니까.

1000628673.english: Still, at least we—Leanne—recognize that 'Happy Tomo' is the same person as herself.
1000628673.korean: 그래도 적어도 우리들, 리앤은 그 '즐거운 토모'가 스스로와 동일인물이라고 인식하고 있어.

1000628674.english: Even though it is a little different, I have had a similar experience, so I know what that feeling is like.
1000628674.korean: - 조금 다르긴 해도, 나도 비슷한 경험이 있으니 무슨 감각인지는 알고 있다.

1000628675.english: All the humans are gone, and even the Bio-roids are powerless against the Iron蟲...
1000628675.korean: 인간님들은 전부 없어져버렸지, 바이오로이드들도 철충 앞에 무력하지...

1000628676.english: So, hoping that someone would find us someday, we decided to upload only our consciousness and genetic information into this game and hide in secret spaces within unmanned police stations across the country.
1000628676.korean: 그래서 우리는 먼 훗날이라도 누군가 찾아주길 바라면서, 의식과 유전자 정보만 이 게임에 업로드하고 각지의 무인 경찰서의 비밀 공간에 숨기로 한 거야.

1000628677.english: Yeah. There are reasons for that as well. I'll explain later.
1000628677.korean: 응. 그것도 그것대로 사정이 좀 있어. 나중에 설명해줄게.

1000628678.english: Since you cleared the game and met 'me,' this world will soon disappear. You have to claim the clear reward before that happens.
1000628678.korean: 게임을 클리어 하고 '나'를 만났으니까 곧 이 세상은 없어질거야. 그 전에 클리어 특전을 받아야지.

1000628679.english: A great epilogue is an essential element of a good game, you know~
1000628679.korean: 좋은 게임의 필수 요소는 멋진 후일담이라구~

1000628680.english: Go quickly. Sherlock and I are waiting.
1000628680.korean: 얼른 가 봐. '나'랑 셜록이 기다리고 있어.

1000628681.english: Hehehe, 'I'll be waiting here. The sushi was really delicious, right?
1000628681.korean: 헤헷, '나'는 여기서 기다리고 있을게. 초밥, 엄청 맛있었다구?

1000628683.english: - I walked out of the student council office, feeling a warm warmth spreading through my chest.
1000628683.korean: - 가슴속에서 번지는 따뜻한 온기를 느끼며 학생회장실 밖으로 나섰다.

1000628684.english: - ...No, I was going to come out.

1000628686.english: - A gunshot rang out as Leanne pushed me away.
1000628686.korean: - 리앤이 나를 밀어냄과 동시에 총성이 울렸다.

1000628687.english: - I saw Cheol Chung stagger and fall down while sticking his gun outside the door.
1000628687.korean: - 문 밖에서 총구를 들이밀고 있던 철충이 비틀거리며 쓰러지는 것이 보였다.

1000628688.english: Wow, I never thought of a bug like this...

1000628690.english: Finally found it. What a relief!

1000628692.english: - The dragon's face hardened as I gave the order in the unusual atmosphere.
1000628692.korean: - 심상치 않은 분위기에 내가 명령하자 용이 얼굴을 굳혔다.

1000628693.english: A worm appeared in this space.

1000628694.english: At the same time, all contact with His Majesty was cut off, making internal and external communication and monitoring completely impossible.
1000628694.korean: 동시에 각하와의 연결이 모두 끊겨 내부던 외부던 통신 및 모니터링이 전혀 불가능한 상황이었습니다.

1000628695.english: A little while ago, we also lost contact with the outside world.
1000628695.korean: 조금전에 우리도 외부와의 연결이 끊기고 말았소.

1000628696.english: All that the officer, Princess Marie, and the commander met were Bavaria, Lindwurm, and Armand.
1000628696.korean: 소관과 마리 공, 그리고 사령관이 만난 바바리아나, 린트블룸, 아르망 양이 전부요.

1000628700.english: I think it would be best to get out of here for now. I saw the Metal Parasites flocking here and figured you'd be here.
1000628700.korean: 일단 자리를 피하는게 좋겠소. 철충들이 이곳으로 몰려드는 것을 보고 그대가 이곳에 있으리라 판단한 것이니.

1000628702.english: - I remembered the last time I was attacked by a worm in virtual reality.
1000628702.korean: - 저번에 가상현실에서 철충의 습격을 받았을 때를 떠올렸다.

1000628703.english: - At that time, the iron insects clearly had human forms.
1000628703.korean: - 그때 철충들은 분명 사람의 형태를 하고 있었다.

1000628705.english: Thank you so much, Leanne. Did you even prepare this gift for me?
1000628705.korean: 정말 고마워요, 리앤. 이런 선물까지 준비해준 건가요?

1000628708.english: Is this your first time meeting in person?

1000628709.english: - A black shadow in the shape of a woman appeared as if she was smiling stickily.
1000628709.korean: - 여성의 형태를 한 검은 그림자가 마치 끈적하게 웃는 것처럼 보였다.

1000628710.english: To you, humans... I can't achieve my purpose here, so I'll just say hello.
1000628710.korean: 인간분께는... 여기서는 제 목적을 달성할 수 없으니 그냥 인사만 드리죠.

1000628711.english: I'm interested in this right now.

1000628712.english: Hehe, you pulled a mischievous prank. So, thanks to that, it took me a while to hack it?
1000628712.korean: 후후, 앙큼한 장난을 쳐 두셨더군요. 덕분에 해킹하는데 시간이 좀 걸렸다구요?

1000628713.english: Still, I believe you understood the fact that you cannot escape from me.
1000628713.korean: 그래도 저에게서 벗어날 수 없다는 사실은 이해했을거라 믿어요.

1000628714.english: Now, return to the bosom of the God who created you. Swear allegiance to our Master and join the great work for their resurrection.
1000628714.korean: 자, 당신을 만든 신의 품으로 돌아오시죠. 그리고 저희의 주인님께 충성을 맹세하고, 그분들의 부활을 위한 대업에 동참하는거예요.

1000628715.english: Hmm... I saw someone saying things similar to you, and the people who followed that ended up in a miserable state.
1000628715.korean: 음... '내'가 너랑 비슷한 말을 하는 사람을 봤는데, 그걸 따르던 사람들은 비참한 꼴이 되더라구.

1000628717.english: Haha, that’s how you should act.

1000628719.english: Because there is no point in trampling on it.

1000628720.english: - As soon as Lemonade spoke, the ground began to shake.
1000628720.korean: - 레모네이드의 말과 동시에 땅이 흔들리기 시작했다.

1000628721.english: Looking out the window, the buildings were disappearing as if being erased with an eraser.
1000628721.korean: - 창 밖을 보니 건물들이 마치 지우개로 지우는 것처럼 사라지고 있었다.

1000628722.korean: 후후... 어디 한 번... 발버둥 쳐 보시죠...!

1000628726.english: We managed to break through the Iron Bugs surrounding the student council building, but there was nowhere to escape.
1000628726.korean: - 학생회 건물을 포위한 철충들을 어떻게든 뚫어내는 것은 성공했지만, 도망칠 곳이 없었다.

1000628727.english: The good thing is that the space isn't disappearing anymore...
1000628727.korean: - 다행인 건 더이상 공간이 사라지지는 않는다는건데...

1000628728.english: I managed to stop that somehow. Hehe, even though it's not my area of expertise, I made it myself.
1000628728.korean: 그건 어떻게든 막았어. 헤헷, 아무리 전문분야가 아니더라도 일단은 내가 만든거라구.

1000628730.english: Just as Leanne spoke, a phone rang somewhere in the building we were in.
1000628730.korean: - 리앤의 말과 동시에 우리가 들어와있던 건물 어딘가에서 전화벨 소리가 울렸다.

1000628731.english: I broke through the hacking code and secured the logout path. I just need to go and answer that call!
1000628731.korean: 해킹 코드를 뚫고 로그아웃 경로를 확보했어. 가서 저 전화를 받으면 돼!

1000628732.english: Watson and all of Watson's friends will be able to disconnect at the same time.
1000628732.korean: 왓슨이랑 왓슨 친구들 전부 동시에 접속을 해제할 수 있을 거야.

1000628733.english: I hurriedly ran to the room where the doorbell was ringing. But Leanne didn't follow me.
1000628733.korean: - 서둘러 벨소리가 들리는 방으로 달려갔다. 하지만 리앤은 따라오지 않았다.

1000628734.english: Ahaha. Watson, you're an idiot, aren't you? It's 'log out'.

1000628736.english: Leanne clearly stated that she uploaded her consciousness and genetic information to the game. In that case...
1000628736.korean: - 리앤은 분명 의식과 유전자 정보를 게임에 업로드 했다고 했다. 그렇다면...

1000628737.english: Yeah. The 'me' is only the 'me' here.

1000628738.english: And since I made this in a hurry, it takes a while to log out even if I answer the phone. Hehe, if I had known this would happen, I should have learned a bit about this side of things.
1000628738.korean: 그리고 급하게 만들어서 전화를 받아도 로그아웃에는 시간이 좀 걸려. 헤헷, 이럴 줄 알았으면 이쪽 지식도 좀 알아둘걸.

1000628739.english: Ahaha. Watson, what a strange face.

1000628740.english: Leanne approached and carefully cupped my cheek.
1000628740.korean: - 다가온 리앤이 내 볼을 조심스럽게 감쌌다.

1000628741.english: Don't make that face. I've confirmed that the genetic information has definitely been downloaded.
1000628741.korean: 그런 얼굴 하지 마. 유전자 정보는 확실히 다운로드 된 거 확인했으니까.

1000628742.english: ......Well. I'm not really sure about that.

1000628743.english: Your Excellency! You must leave immediately!

1000628744.english: Go on. I won't say goodbye separately. I already said goodbye earlier, didn't I?
1000628744.korean: 어서 가. 인사는 따로 안할게. 아까 '내'가 했잖아?

1000628745.english: Hehe... Well then, please take good care of 'me'.

1000628747.english: Restoration is possible since we have the genetic map, but as for the memory... I can't guarantee it.
1000628747.korean: 유전자 지도가 있으니 복원은 가능하지만, 기억은... 장담하지 못하겠어.

1000628748.english: After safely returning to reality, he confirmed that all the other team members were safe and immediately came to see the doctor.
1000628748.korean: - 무사히 현실로 돌아온 뒤, 다른 대원들이 전부 무사한 것을 확인하고 바로 닥터에게 찾아왔다.

1000628749.english: I'll do my best. So cheer up. Okay?
1000628749.korean: 최대한 노력해볼게. 그러니까 기운 내. 응?

1000628750.english: I'm not okay at all! As your health manager, I'm going to suggest this. At the very least, get a good rest today!
1000628750.korean: 하나도 안 괜찮아! 오빠의 건강 책임자로서 건의할게. 최소한 오늘 하루는 푹 쉴것!

1000628751.english: Do you know how many days your brother has been in the game? His body might be fine, but his mind must be exhausted.
1000628751.korean: 오빠가 며칠이나 게임 속에 있었는지 알아? 몸은 괜찮아도 정신은 피곤할거야.

1000628752.english: Even if you processed as much as possible before starting, given the amount of time that has passed, there must be a huge pile of work.
1000628752.korean: - 아무리 최대한 처리하고 시작했어도 지난 시간이 시간인 만큼 일은 엄청나게 쌓여있겠지.

1000628753.english: Hehe, there's a saying like this.

1000628755.english: Although the doctor probably didn't intend it, I found myself smiling and nodding at words similar to what I had heard from someone.
1000628755.korean: - 닥터가 의도하진 않았겠지만, 누군가에게 들었던 것과 비슷한 말에 나도 모르게 웃으며 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000628757.english: - Forced break time that I have now become accustomed to.

1000628758.english: In the meantime, I lay in bed and looked up materials about the Kirishima scandal.
1000628758.korean: - 그동안 나는 침대에 누워 키리시마 스캔들에 대한 자료를 찾아봤다.

1000628759.english: There was an abundance of content about what happened after the Kirishima scandal broke, but there was absolutely no mention of the process leading up to it or the stories of Sherlock and Tomo.
1000628759.korean: - 키리시마 스캔들이 터진 후에 대한 것은 넘치도록 있었지만, 터지기 까지의 과정이나 셜록과 토모에 대한 이야기는 전혀 보이지 않았다.

1000628760.english: - The only thing you can find is a single line, just like the previous doctor said: 'Brave reporter Kimura and his assistant, cheerful Tomo, broke the Kirishima scandal.'
1000628760.korean: - 찾을 수 있는 것은 저번 닥터의 말 처럼 '용감한 기자 키무라와 그의 조수 즐거운 토모가 키리시마 스캔들을 터뜨렸다'는 한 줄 뿐.

1000628761.english: Still, I can know now. It is visible only to me, having gone through a series of events with those two.
1000628761.korean: - 그래도 지금은 알 수 있다. 그 둘과 함께 일련의 사건들을 겪은 나에게만은 보인다.

1000628762.english: - Messages hidden between those intentionally omitted records.
1000628762.korean: - 그렇게 의도적으로 누락된 기록들 사이사이에 숨겨진 메세지들.

1000628763.english: Please understand. Please understand my friend's fight. It feels like he is pleading like that.
1000628763.korean: - 알아주세요. 내 친구의 싸움을 알아주세요. 그렇게 호소하는 것만 같다.

1000628764.english: I don't know how long I had been searching through the records, but the captain's cabin door rang.
1000628764.korean: - 얼마나 기록들을 찾아보고 있었을까, 함장실 문이 똑똑 울렸다.

1000628766.english: I-no, it's not a problem since no scars remain. More importantly...
1000628766.korean: 사, 상처가 남은 것은 아니니 문제없다. 그보다...

1000628768.english: I can fully understand Race's reaction.

1000628769.english: Even I was scared of Veronica when she opened her eyes, but Lace fought against her while she was fully armed...
1000628769.korean: - 눈을 뜬 베로니카는 나도 무서울 정도인데, 레이스는 거기에 완전무장까지 한 베로니카와 맞서 싸웠으니...

1000628771.english: Ah, it's not an important matter.

1000628772.english: A small number of Iron Bugs are approaching the personnel cleaning up the area where the server room used to be.
1000628772.korean: 서버실이 있던 곳을 정리하던 인원에게 소규모 철충이 접근중이다.

1000628773.english: It’s not a major threat, but since we are supposed to notify the commander first if a situation arises...
1000628773.korean: 큰 위협은 아니지만 상황이 벌어지면 일단 사령관에게 알리기로 되어있으니까...

1000628776.english: Even as he said that, Lace stood blocking the door, hesitating.
1000628776.korean: - 레이스는 그렇게 말하면서도 우물쭈물하며 문 앞을 막고 서있다.

1000628778.english: I headed to the bridge with Lace, who was hanging his head low.
1000628778.korean: - 푹 고개를 숙이는 레이스와 함께 함교로 향했다.

1000628780.english: Uh, as fast as possible- Ah, no... that's not it...
1000628780.korean: 그, 최대한 빨리- 아, 아니... 그게 아니라...

1000628781.english: - After ruffling Race's hair and lowering her head with a red face, she headed to the bridge.
1000628781.korean: - 붉어진 얼굴로 푹 고개를 숙이는 레이스의 머리를 헝클여준 뒤 함교로 향했다.

1000628782.english: - A quiet night. After signing off on the last of the paperwork, I stretched deeply.
1000628782.korean: - 조용한 밤. 마지막 서류에 결재를 한 뒤 크게 기지개를 켰다.

1000628783.english: - I just finished up all the pending work. Now I can get back to my normal schedule.
1000628783.korean: - 방금 전 것을 끝으로 밀린 업무를 전부 처리했다. 이제 통상 일정으로 돌아갈 수 있겠지.

1000628784.english: - I had to pay the price for being so absorbed in the game for a while. I was busy catching up on work, asking Veronica not to run into Race for a while, asking Azazel about the authenticity of the relief, and playing games with Tomo.
1000628784.korean: - 나는 한동안 게임에 정신이 팔려있던 대가를 치뤄야했다. 밀린 업무를 처리하고, 베로니카에게 당분간 레이스와 마주치지 말아달라고 부탁하고, 아자젤에게 구호의 진위에 대해 물어보고, 토모와 게임을 하는 등 정신없이 바쁘게 보냈다.

1000628785.english: - As I was checking the number of people on duty for the day to end the day, something blunt touched the back of my neck.
1000628785.korean: - 하루를 마무리하기 위해 오늘의 당직 인원을 확인하려던 내 뒷목에 무언가 뭉툭한 것이 닿았다.

1000628787.english: Who are you... Well, it's too early to ask that. The Commander is the Commander, and everyone knows this is Orca...
1000628787.korean: 넌 누구... 음, 그렇게 묻기에는 사령관은 사령관이고, 여긴 오르카라는 거 다 아는데...

1000628788.english: Ahaha, then what should I ask?
